channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: États-Unis | L’État de New York met en pause la construction de centres de données
item.description: L’État de New York va cesser de délivrer, pendant un an, des permis de construire pour de nouveaux centres de données de grande envergure (d’une capacité d’au moins 50 mégawatts), une première pour un État américain.

item.title: Google and Epic give up fighting — third-party Android app stores are coming next week
item.description: Epic Games and Google have just jointly withdrawn their attempt to retroactively settle the lawsuit that's changing how Android app stores work in the United States - and that means Google will be forced to carry rival app stores inside of its own. In fact, Google tells the court, it's ready to begin carrying third-party […]

item.title: Volkswagen unveils its innovative eBike with the world's first integrated rear-view camera and smart glasses
item.description: This Volkswagen eBike has a rear-view camera, blind-spot alerts, and a HUD.

item.title: 'The future is now' — PS5 user locked out of Ghost of Yotei due to license verification, and this is why Sony's all-digital future plans must end
item.description: The future of gaming on PlayStation is poised to arguably be at its worst state ever once 2028 arrives, and this license verification case shows why.

item.title: Gigabyte Aorus Master 16 Gen 2 review: full-power RTX 5090 performance in a slim 16-inch chassis
item.description: The Gigabyte Aorus Master 16 combines a 175W RTX 5090, a Ryzen 9 9955HX3D and excellent 240Hz OLED display in a slim 16-inch chassis.
